commands.author: MonkeyLeeT

target.title: fix(agents): keep lightweight cron prompts out of no-op compaction
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes #96658.

Lightweight isolated cron runs on very small context windows can reserve too much of the model window before the first prompt is sent. In the reported 4,096-token fallback-model case, current `main` leaves only 2,048 prompt tokens for a 3,544-token lightweight cron prompt, so the precheck routes to `compact_only` even though the lightweight bootstrap has no useful history to compact.

## Why This Change Was Made

This keeps the shared small-context prompt floor conservative: `MIN_PROMPT_BUDGET_RATIO` remains `0.5` for full-context callers, settings reserve capping, CLI compaction, mid-turn guard paths, image prompts, and lightweight shared-history runs.

The higher 87.5% prompt share is scoped to history-free lightweight pre-prompt admission. Current head also budgets the concrete runtime/client tool schemas before accepting a lightweight `fits` route, so tool-enabled cron runs can still use the raised floor when prompt plus tools fit, while tool-heavy requests remain conservative.

No provider alias mapping, SDK shape, config, docs, or global budget policy is changed.

## User Impact

Lightweight cron jobs on small-context fallback models can proceed when the rendered prompt and active tool schema surface fit the model window, instead of entering no-op compact-only recovery with nothing useful to compact.

Tool-heavy runs, prompt-image runs, shared-history lightweight runs, and non-lightweight/full-context paths keep conservative behavior.

## Evidence

Current-head behavior proof for the reported 4,096-token / 20,000-reserve / 3,544-token case:

```text
history-free lightweight, no tools: route=fits, promptBudgetBeforeReserve=3584, effectiveReserveTokens=512
history-free lightweight, small tool schema: promptBudgetBeforeReserve is above 2048 and below 3584; a 3000-token prompt routes fits
history-free lightweight, larger tool schema: promptBudgetBeforeReserve is above 2048 and below 3544; the reported 3544-token prompt routes compact_only instead of false-fitting
prompt image, shared-history lightweight, and full mode all keep the shared 2048-token floor on 4k models
```

Focused validation on current head `55ca9094e52`:

```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/preemptive-compaction.test.ts src/agents/command/cli-compaction.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.tools-allow.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.message-tool-policy.test.ts
# PASS: 4 files, 96 tests

node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo
# PASS

node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/preemptive-compaction.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/preemptive-compaction.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts
# PASS

git diff --check
# PASS
```

Earlier real lightweight cron proof on this PR branch used a temp `HOME` / `OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR`, local mock OpenAI Responses provider, `openai/gpt-5.5` configured with `contextWindow=4096` / `contextTokens=4096`, and `agents.defaults.compaction.reserveTokens=20000`. A forced isolated `payload.lightContext=true` cron run finished `status=ok`; the provider saw `/v1/responses` requests and the Gateway precheck logged `route=fits estimatedPromptTokens=3318 promptBudgetBeforeReserve=3584 overflowTokens=0 effectiveReserveTokens=512 contextTokenBudget=4096 messages=0`.

Review comments addressed:

- Codex / ClawSweeper image follow-up: prompt-image lightweight runs stay on the shared floor.
- ClawSweeper tool follow-up: tool-enabled lightweight runs no longer fall back solely because tools exist; active tool schema pressure is subtracted before accepting `fits`.
- Scope reduction: removed provider alias/schema-shape budgeting and kept the implementation inside the existing pre-prompt helper plus its caller.

Autoreview: attempted one local draft-PR review round earlier, but the helper failed before review due local Codex config parsing (`service_tier = priority`; helper expected `fast` or `flex`). No autoreview findings were produced.

Agent transcript: a matching local session was found, but no transcript is included because adding sanitized transcript logs requires explicit approval.
target.author: monkeyleet

commands.reason: matching ClawSweeper response comment already exists
